title: inputs not the same size
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, name TEXT, value REAL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('test2', NULL);
CREATE TABLE join_table (join_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, test_table_id INTEGER, description TEXT, FOREIGN KEY(test_table_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
key_bug_features: mismatched input sizes in join operations
